series_metadata.series_description: Files maintained by calendar year relating to various discrimination complaints filed by employees and; consumer complaints that fall within the agency’s jurisdiction. Record series includes documents regarding civil rights, Title VII and other discrimination complaints. Documents may include complaint form, Ohio Civil Rights Commission (OCRC) and Equal Employment Opportunity Commission (EEOC) charge affidavits filed by employees, applicants and consumers; investigation packets and, all documentation associated with the filing and settlement of these complaints.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: three (3) years from end of calendar year in which case was closed. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: three (3) years from end of calendar year in which case was closed. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records
